def greet_many(names):
    return ["Hello, {}{}!".format(title, name) for name, title in zip(["" for _ in names], names)]

greet_formally = lambda name, title: "Hello, {}{}!".format(title, name)
greet_user = lambda name: "Hello, {}!".format(name)
